notes: Improves Gamepad pairing on fresh installs by using a per-command BlueZ pairing agent for controllers that use Just Works pairing.
Keeps Bluetooth in dual-mode with LE HID security upgrades enabled for XInput, Android, Switch, and similar controller modes.
Only reports a controller as connected after BlueZ says it stayed connected long enough to be usable.
Moves Gamepad pair, connect, and remove actions off the UI thread so Settings no longer freezes while Bluetooth is working.
